description_long: This is a mid-top athletic shoe designed for children, featuring a predominantly purple synthetic upper with pink accents and a rugged, grippy sole. The shoe has two Velcro straps across the top for easy fastening and adjustment, complemented by pink pull tabs at the tongue and heel for convenient wearing. The upper material appears to be a combination of mesh and synthetic overlays, providing both breathability and structural support. The outsole is made of durable rubber with a pronounced tread pattern for enhanced traction, suitable for outdoor activities. The interior is lined with soft, padded fabric in a light pink color, ensuring comfort for the wearer. Branding is visible on the side, and the overall construction suggests durability and suitability for urban and park environments.
description: A purple and pink mid-top children's athletic shoe with Velcro straps, rugged rubber sole, and visible branding, designed for comfort and outdoor use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the purple upper, pink accents, Velcro straps, and visible brand name on the side.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the toe cap, dual Velcro straps, pink pull tab, and detailed lacing design.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the heel structure, pink interior lining, and the rugged outsole wrapping up the back.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the heel, pink pull tab, and the curvature of the sole with visible tread.
attribute_logo: Rectangular Merrell logo on the side in gray and white
attribute_lacing_style: Velcro straps with decorative elastic lacing
